text.content: Every pet is unique — and so is every needle felted portrait I create. I hand-felt each piece from wool to capture your pet's personality and likeness. Here's how the ordering process works from start to finish in detail.

rich_text.plain_text: Every pet is unique — and so is every needle felted portrait I create. I hand-felt each piece from wool to capture your pet's personality and likeness. Here's how the ordering process works from start to finish in detail.

text.content: Please email them to me at

text.content: The photos/videos are the essence. They’re what I work from to capture your pet’s personality.

rich_text.plain_text: The photos/videos are the essence. They’re what I work from to capture your pet’s personality.

text.content: Clear shots of your pet’s face from the front and side

text.content: Send as many as you’d like—Google Photos albums work great too if that’s easier.

text.content: for baseline rates. Most customers just pay directly through the website. Shipping fee is already included.

text.content: If you need something custom (like a larger portrait size, for example), I’ll send you a Stripe payment link via email instead. We’ll lock in the final price once we’ve chatted through the details.

text.content: Here's where your pet comes to life in wool. I work entirely by hand, building up layers of fiber with needle felting to sculpt every detail—capturing that spark in their eyes and the unique tilt of their ears. Each piece is made slowly from start to finish with no shortcuts.

rich_text.plain_text: Here's where your pet comes to life in wool. I work entirely by hand, building up layers of fiber with needle felting to sculpt every detail—capturing that spark in their eyes and the unique tilt of their ears. Each piece is made slowly from start to finish with no shortcuts.

text.content: Once your portrait is ready, I'll send you photos to look over. If anything needs a small tweak, just say the word. After you give me the thumbs up, I'll carefully package your piece and ship it out, making sure it arrives at your door safe and sound.

rich_text.plain_text: Once your portrait is ready, I'll send you photos to look over. If anything needs a small tweak, just say the word. After you give me the thumbs up, I'll carefully package your piece and ship it out, making sure it arrives at your door safe and sound.

text.content: Right now I specialize in cats and dogs of all breeds.

rich_text.plain_text: Right now I specialize in cats and dogs of all breeds.

text.content: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?

rich_text.plain_text: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?

text.content: I always send photos for customers’ approval before I finish, so there's still time to adjust. I provide unlimited revisions until you love it. So far, every customer has been thrilled with the result.

rich_text.plain_text: I always send photos for customers’ approval before I finish, so there's still time to adjust. I provide unlimited revisions until you love it. So far, every customer has been thrilled with the result.

text.content: I'd love to create a one-of-a-kind portrait of your pet. Send me your photos and let's bring your furry friend to life in wool!
